scripts.supabase:db:push:dry: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_REF && supabase db push --dry-run'
scripts.supabase:db:push: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase link --project-ref $SUPABASE_REF && supabase db push'
scripts.supabase:deploy-functions: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase functions deploy generate-invoice-pdf --project-ref $SUPABASE_REF && supabase functions deploy send-invoice --project-ref $SUPABASE_REF'
scripts.supabase:gen-types: dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'supabase gen types typescript --project-id $SUPABASE_REF --schema public > src/lib/types/database.ts'
scripts.supabase:ship: npm run check && npm run supabase:db:push:dry && echo '\nDry run OK. Review above, then run: npm run supabase:ship:apply'
scripts.supabase:ship:apply: npm run check && npm run supabase:db:push && npm run supabase:deploy-functions
